title: Static HTML status pages over the .excn JSON for at-a-glance team status
description: minimalist static HTML page(s) that read the .excn work-tracking JSON (sprints/, issues/ partitions, prds/, *_progress.json) and render current state — what's shipped / in-flight / backlog — so an end-user can glance at status without interrupting the team. Basic, minimalist; ideally no build step (read JSON client-side).
acceptance_criteria: opening the page shows the live sprint's shipped/in_progress/not_shipped and the backlog from the JSON with no manual data entry
no build step required to view
